programmes.programmeName: Master of Social Sciences (MSocSc) in Smart, Resilient and Sustainable Cities
programmes.faculty: Academy of Geography, Sociology and International Studies
programmes.statusNote: The latest publicly accessible HKBU Academic Registry handbook page publishes the complete 2025-26 27-unit curriculum: four Programme Required Courses (12 units) and a 15-unit Elective requirement. Students may complete either the 6-unit GEOG7670 Group Project or GEOG7680 Professional Placement, or replace that component with two additional 3-unit Electives. The mutually exclusive Project/Placement/extra-Electives choice and annual availability require manual audit review. GEOG7510 and GEOG7540 are officially joint courses with undergraduate students. The protected 2026-27 handbook must be rechecked when it becomes publicly accessible.

courseGroups.name: Programme Required Courses
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete all four Programme Required Courses (12 units).

courses.name: Geospatial Analytics, AI and Big Data for Smart, Resilient and Sustainable Cities
Carbon Management for Smart, Resilient and Sustainable Cities
Geopolitics in Smart, Resilient and Sustainable Cities

courseGroups.name: Elective Courses
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete 15 Elective units. Students may choose either GEOG7670 Group Project or GEOG7680 Professional Placement (6 units), or two additional 3-unit Electives instead. The Project and Placement are alternatives and must not both be counted automatically.

courses.name: The Built Environment, Transport Choice and Wellbeing
Resource and Environmental Management in China
Urban and Regional Development of China
Graduate Seminar on Geography of China
Sustainable Energy and Technological Innovation in China
